title: fixtures + tests: all Space methods
description:
What: 8 fixture files + 9 tests for all Space methods.

Fixtures in crates/jmap-chat/tests/fixtures/methods/:
- space_get_response.json: GetResponse<Space> with one Space object
- space_changes_response.json: ChangesResponse
- space_set_create_response.json: SetResponse with created map
- space_set_update_response.json: SetResponse with updated map
- space_set_destroy_response.json: SetResponse with destroyed list
- space_query_response.json: QueryResponse with ids list
- space_query_changes_response.json: QueryChangesResponse
- space_join_response.json: SpaceJoinResponse {accountId, spaceId}

Tests (after test 46):
- test 47: space_get_returns_typed_response
- test 48: space_changes_returns_typed_response
- test 49: space_create_returns_typed_response — body_json verifies name present, optional fields absent when None
- test 50: space_set_update_returns_typed_response — body_json verifies simple metadata patch
- test 51: space_set_destroy_returns_typed_response
- test 52: space_query_returns_typed_response — body_json verifies filter/position
- test 53: space_query_changes_returns_typed_response — verify maxChanges absent when None
- test 54: space_join_by_invite_code — body_json verifies inviteCode present, spaceId absent
- test 55: space_join_rejects_neither_nor_both — guard test

Update README.md methods/ table with 8 new rows.
Run cargo fmt, clippy, test (expect 55+ passing). Close bead.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes including tests 47-55; 8 fixtures exist; README updated; clippy clean
